{{CargoRelic
|name=Gourd of Kaara
|class_id=20003
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Wind Ninja always carries this gourd with him. He uses the sand inside to perform his ninja skills.
|fame=20
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=30
|tech=10
|ss1=Snail ATK +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +30
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br> (Awakened)
}}
